free_text: Measurement of (n,p) cross sections on isotopes of
Cd, Sn and Te for 14 MeV neutrons.
Institut fuer Radiumforschung und Kernphysik, Vienna.
For measurements of the short-lived activities
produced, an automatically operated pneumatic tube
system with 300 ms transfer time was used.
was 4.2 keV at 1.33 MeV. Calibrated by IAEA source.
